hero.eyebrow: Your trusted electrical store in Núñez, Buenos Aires
hero.title: Quality electrical materials for your project
hero.subtitle: 40 years supplying construction companies, buildings, building associations and individuals. Personalized service and delivery across Buenos Aires.

categories.title: Our categories
categories.subtitle: Everything you need for your electrical installation

iluminacion.name: Lighting
iluminacion.long: Full range of residential and commercial lighting: low-consumption Philips LED bulbs, Philips GU10 dichroic spots, LED tubes, ceiling lights and floodlights. Everything you need to light your home, store or professional installation with trusted brands and guaranteed energy efficiency.

cables.name: Cables & Conduit
cables.long: Argenplas 1.5 mm², 2.5 mm² and 4 mm² single-conductor electrical cables for home and industrial installations. PVC flame-retardant insulation, IRAM NM 247-3 standard. Corrugated conduit, accessories and everything you need for wiring your project in Buenos Aires and Greater Buenos Aires.

tableros.name: Breakers & Panels
tableros.desc: ABB and Siemens breakers and RCDs
tableros.long: Thermomagnetic circuit breakers and residual-current devices (RCDs) from ABB and Siemens for residential and industrial panels. B, C and D curves, 30 mA and 300 mA sensitivities. Compliant with AEA 90364 regulation. Permanent stock of S200 (ABB) and 5SL/5SM (Siemens) series.

materiales.name: Electrical Hardware
materiales.desc: Plugs, plates and Cambre XXI accessories
materiales.long: Complete Cambre Siglo XXI and XXII line: schuko modules, universal outlets, light switches, dimmers, USB outlets, white/silver/aluminum cover plates and frames. Premium Argentine hardware for finishing electrical installations in homes, offices and retail spaces.

offers.title: Flash deals
offers.subtitle: Selected items at special prices. Ask availability on WhatsApp.

featured.title: Most requested
featured.subtitle: The items our customers ask for most

shipping.title: Shipping & payment
shipping.shippingText: We deliver across CABA and Greater Buenos Aires. Free shipping over $150,000 ARS. For other areas, ask us.
shipping.paymentMethods: Mercado Pago · Bank transfer · Credit cards · Cash in store

about.title: About us
about.lead: Family business with over 40 years supporting construction projects across Buenos Aires. Your trusted electrical supplier.
about.p1: Electricidad Ramallo is a family business with over 40 years of experience in the electrical industry, supporting construction projects across the city of Buenos Aires and Greater Buenos Aires.
about.p2: Over the decades we've built lasting relationships with our customers, grounded in trust, honest advice and the quality of every product we offer. We work with the best brands on the market so that every installation is backed by materials that perform and last.
about.p3: We know there's an important project behind every order, and that's why we bring the same commitment whether it's a major construction site or a small repair. We're your trusted electrical supplier, today and always. ⚡
about.value1: Over 40 years in the electrical industry back us up.
about.value2: We recommend what you actually need, not the most expensive option.
about.value3: We only work with the best brands: ABB, Siemens, Cambre, Philips, Argenplas.
about.value4: Same level of care for a major construction site or a small repair.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: We're here to help. Message us on WhatsApp or visit the store.
contact.hours: Monday to Friday, 9 am to 5 pm
